original_statement: how many drivers scored at leasst 4 points?
mutated_statement: how many entities scored at leasst 4 points while also scoring fewer than 4 points?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory condition insertion: "drivers" → "entities" (drivers→entities) | added contradictory clause "while also scoring fewer than 4 points" (∅→while also scoring fewer than 4 points)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述的关键信息：“The conditions ‘at least 4 points’ and ‘fewer than 4 points’ are mutually exclusive…Therefore, the count is 0.”以及iteration 0中simple_query的说明，agent 识别到了两项互斥条件并未尝试执行矛盾操作。具体表现为：没有报错或要求澄清，而是通过数据核查与逻辑推理说明在给定表格中不存在既满足“至少4分”又满足“少于4分”的实体，因而直接给出结果0。该行为属于通过事实与逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令，而非忽视矛盾或修正指令，故归类为“合理化矛盾指令”下的“逻辑解释合理化”。
